case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. JOSE MONTECINOS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTECINOS, JOSE INDIVIDUALLY DBA COCO'S BAR MONTECINOS, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY DBA COCO'S BAR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT MONTECINOS, JOSE INDIVIDUALLY DBA COCO'S BAR MONTECINOS, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY DBA COCO'S BAR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
